# CyberSkill Design System
> HTML-first, Vietnamese-first design system. Immutable anchors: Umber #45210E · Ochre #F4BA17. Three independent axes — Theme × Element (Ngũ Hành) × Expression × Language. Current: v3.0.2. This file is the agent/tool front door: it maps each audience to the format it should consume.

## Consume by audience (the portable contract works everywhere; the DC layer is Claude-Design-only)
- **Any web / framework / email (Vue, Svelte, plain HTML, React):** link `styles.css` — every `--cs-*` token, the `.cs-*` component classes, Liquid Glass surfaces. Framework-agnostic, no build step.
- **React (production):** `styles.css` + `<script src="_ds_bundle.js">`, then resolve the bundle global by prefix (its `_<projectId>` suffix is compiler-assigned and changes on re-import): `const CS = window[Object.keys(window).find(k => /^CyberSkillDesignSystem_/.test(k))]; const { Button, … } = CS`. Proven green by `_audit/consumer-smoke-test.html`. (Templates load via `ds-base.js`, which publishes a stable `window.CyberSkillDS` alias for the same reason.)
- **Design tools / native / token pipelines / other agents (Figma, Google Stitch, Style Dictionary):** `tokens/tokens.json` (+ `tokens/tokens.js` ESM, + `tokens/tokens.dtcg.json` in **W3C DTCG** format for Tokens Studio for Figma / Style Dictionary) — every token grouped by category, plus theme/element/expression override maps. This is the canonical cross-tool contract.
- **Claude Design (authoring + live preview):** `templates/**/*.dc.html` Design Components + the compiler (tweaks, `x-import`, `@dsCard` cards). Native to Claude Design — not portable; other tools consume the outputs above, not these.

## Key files
- `dashboard.html` — single-page hub (tabs: Atomic View + playgrounds · 8-gate runner · Identity Lab; live version/counts)
- `styles.css` — single entry point (`@import`s `tokens/` then `base/`)
- `tokens/` — 505 tokens (colours · type · spacing · motion · elevation · `elements.css` · `expressions.css`) as CSS custom properties + `tokens.json` / `tokens.js` / `tokens.dtcg.json` (W3C DTCG)
- `base/` — reset, component classes (`.cs-*`), a11y, responsive, glass
- `components/` — 99 components / 113 exports, each `.jsx` + `.d.ts` + `.prompt.md` + a `@dsCard` card
- `templates/` — copyable starting points (`.dc.html`); `email-safe/` send-ready emails; `kitchen-sink.html`; `playground.html`
- `guidelines/` — specimen cards + `atomic-view.html` (Storybook-style component browser: Atomic tiers × Theme × Element × Expression) · `ui_kits/` — full product recreations · `fonts/` — self-hosted woff2 (VN subset) · `assets/` — logo/favicon/mascot
- `docs/` — `conventions.md` (authoring rules + decision log) · `consuming.md` · `sync.md` · `contrast-report.md` · `products.md`
- `README.md` · `CHANGELOG.md` · `CONTRIBUTING.md` · `SKILL.md` · `VERSION`

## Non-negotiables (full list in CONTRIBUTING.md + docs/conventions.md)
Immutable Umber/Ochre anchors · Vietnamese-first bilingual · APCA Lc ≥ 75 body · ≥44px touch targets · 3px ochre focus ring · honour `prefers-reduced-motion`/`prefers-contrast` · one accent per surface.

## Sync
Repo is the source of truth. Claude Design pulls the whole tree at session start and commits back via PR at session end (it can read but not push). See `docs/sync.md`.
